source: Self-Transfer & C2C Scenario Pack (illustrative, non-exhaustive · not legal advice · counsel review required) · Mal-CRAM-US-01 v2.3 (CRAM-US-2026-07-FREEZE-03) · MAL-TA-01 v1.0 · MSB Compliance Risk Typology Register (Draft v0.1) · MAL-TM-PPC-CATALOG v1.0
note: Individual self-transfer (own-account) & C2C scenarios, organised by residence jurisdiction then nationality permutation — geography (not occupation/nationality) drives the outcome. Guidance only; the customer rating is set by the CRAM composite.

scenarios.title: Pakistani national, resident Karachi — salaried, self-transfer + family C2C
scenarios.profile: Textile-export employee; salary inflows plus occasional family remittance and periodic self-transfers to his own account at another bank.
scenarios.segment: Salaried (Medium segment) on a High corridor
scenarios.geography: Residence PK (permitted, passes G0) · nationality PK · SoW = PK salary · SoF = PK salary account
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer own-account (C2C-12) with same-name CoP; C2C-01 family support to PK relatives
scenarios.corridor: US→PK High (EWRA override); floors to High on corridor concentration
scenarios.screening: Sanctions clear; not PEP; adverse-media clear; watchlist clear
scenarios.rating: High — EDD mandatory (corridor), not because of the person
scenarios.documents: CNIC/passport; PK PoA <90d; employer letter + 3 payslips + 3-month salary-credit statements (SoF); expected-activity profile. Same-name CoP is a hard control on the self-transfer.
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in on payroll cadence; small recurring family C2C; occasional same-name self-transfer
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Multi-currency cash funding; unrelated third-party credits; remittances exceeding wage; many-to-one funnel; rapid onward pass-through; wallet-tier structuring (JazzCash/Easypaisa); self-transfer velocity feeding layering pre-stage
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High/monitored. Escalate on funnel / hawala interface / missing settlement leg

scenarios.title: Pakistani account used as a many-to-one funnel — C2C hawala interface (override)
scenarios.profile: Account receives credits from many unrelated senders then remits to a small set of PK beneficiaries; volume ≫ declared wage; 'agent will deliver' references.
scenarios.geography: Residence PK · nationality PK · SoW/SoF nominally salary but incoherent with volume
scenarios.flow: Inbound C2C from many senders; outbound C2C to few beneficiaries; no bank settlement leg (hawala/hundi)
scenarios.corridor: US→PK High; TYP-PK-001 hawala/hundi, TYP-PK-013 iWRA
scenarios.screening: May be clean — this is behavioural, not list-based
scenarios.rating: High → override on confirmed funnel / hawala interface
scenarios.documents: RFI on who the senders are + account-holder control; funnel detection (senders-per-beneficiary); remittance-vs-income; settlement-leg absence
scenarios.expectedActivity: Declared 'family support' inconsistent with many unrelated senders
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Senders-per-beneficiary over rolling 30-day window; same-day pass-through; no balance retention
scenarios.sarPosture: Third-party control / hawala confirmed → freeze + SAR (goAML/FMU nexus). Customer may be a coerced mule → victim-aware exit, not punitive. Anti-tipping-off throughout.
scenarios.outcome: Freeze + SAR + exit

scenarios.title: US national resident in Pakistan — salaried expat, self-transfer to US own account
scenarios.profile: US citizen working in Pakistan, salaried at a multinational; self-transfers savings to his own US account and sends occasional C2C gifts to US family.
scenarios.geography: Residence PK (permitted) · nationality US · birthplace immaterial · SoW/SoF = PK-earned salary
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12 to own US account (same-name CoP); C2C-02 gift to US family
scenarios.corridor: PK residence → High corridor scoring applies regardless of US nationality (geography is primary)
scenarios.screening: US SSN/W-9 validation required (CIP); sanctions/PEP/adverse-media clear
scenarios.rating: High (corridor) — the US passport does not lower the corridor floor
scenarios.documents: Passport + US CIP (SSN/TIN — if the validation API errors, hold, do not default to Low); PK PoA; employer letter + payslips; expected-activity profile. Same-name CoP on the US self-transfer.
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; periodic same-name self-transfer to US; small US-family C2C
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Self-transfer amounts inconsistent with salary; any inbound third-party credits before a self-transfer out (layering pre-stage)
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High/monitored. Teaching point: a clean US profile does not override PK corridor risk

scenarios.title: Afghan national resident in Pakistan — restricted-country nationality, PK salary (Rule 1 vs screening)
scenarios.profile: Afghan passport-holder legally resident in Pakistan on a work visa, salaried locally; wants a USD account, self-transfers and family C2C within PK.
scenarios.segment: Salaried (Medium) on a High corridor with a restricted-nationality overlay
scenarios.geography: Residence PK (permitted, passes G0) · nationality AF (restricted, non-OFAC-comprehensive) · SoW/SoF = PK salary (no Afghanistan money nexus)
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12; C2C-01 family support within PK
scenarios.corridor: US→PK High; plus restricted-nationality screening escalation
scenarios.screening: Afghan nationality → screening escalation + EDD flag (not a block — no residence/SoF/SoW/corridor nexus to Afghanistan). Any Afghanistan corridor stays blocked.
scenarios.documents: Passport + PK residence/visa + tenure; PK PoA; employer letter + payslips (SoF); restricted-country nexus screening on counterparties; confirm no Afghanistan corridor requested
scenarios.expectedActivity: PK-salary in; PK-internal C2C; no Afghanistan leg
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any emergent Afghanistan corridor (→ reject); restricted-country counterparties; funnel signals
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High/EDD; Afghanistan corridor disabled at product level. If SoW later shows Afghanistan origin → Rule 1 documentary path (High-floor) or, if unresolved, decline

scenarios.title: Iranian national resident in Pakistan — prohibited-absolute nationality + money nexus (block)
scenarios.profile: Iranian passport-holder resident in Pakistan; source of wealth traces to Iran; wishes to receive from / send to Iran.
scenarios.segment: Any segment — irrelevant to the outcome
scenarios.geography: Residence PK (permitted) BUT nationality IR (prohibited-absolute) + SoW nexus to Iran + Iran corridor requested
scenarios.flow: Any self-transfer / C2C with an Iran nexus
scenarios.corridor: Iran comprehensively sanctioned; any nexus blocks (CRAM §7.1)
scenarios.screening: G1 fails — prohibited-country passport + money/corridor nexus = Prohibited (Rule 3 final clause)
scenarios.documents: None requested — no document cures a prohibited-origin/corridor nexus
scenarios.expectedActivity: N/A
scenarios.behaviourWatch: N/A at onboarding. If discovered post-onboarding on an existing customer → block + SAR
scenarios.sarPosture: Block + SAR; OFAC blocking report within 10 business days if funds are captured
scenarios.outcome: Decline / Block. Teaching point: PK residence does not save an Iran money/corridor nexus

scenarios.title: Egyptian national, resident Cairo — salaried multinational, self-transfer + C2C
scenarios.profile: Salaried at a multinational; self-transfers to his own account and makes family C2C within Egypt.
scenarios.geography: Residence EG (permitted, FATF grey-list) · nationality EG · SoW/SoF = EG salary
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12 (same-name CoP); C2C-01 family support
scenarios.corridor: US→EG High — parallel-market FX, TBML, charity-channel typologies
scenarios.screening: Sanctions/PEP/adverse-media clear
scenarios.documents: National ID/passport; PoA <90d; employer letter + payslips + bank statements. Red-flag watch: parallel-market FX pattern; charity onward flows
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; EG-internal C2C; periodic same-name self-transfer
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Transfers timed to FX-rate gaps; structuring around FX limits; pressure to convert to USD cash; charity onward flows to opaque beneficiaries
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High/EDD. If declared purpose is 'FX/money-changing' → possible unregistered money transmission → escalate/decline

scenarios.title: Egyptian self-employed — parallel-market FX pattern via self-transfer & C2C
scenarios.profile: Self-employed; transfers timed to FX-rate gaps; structuring around FX limits; uses self-transfers and C2C to move value.
scenarios.segment: Self-employed / sole trader (High) on a High corridor
scenarios.geography: Residence EG · nationality EG · SoW/SoF = EG business income
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer to own accounts + C2C to associates; FX-limit-adjacent sizing
scenarios.corridor: US→EG High; parallel-market FX / currency smuggling
scenarios.screening: Screening clean — behavioural
scenarios.documents: Trade licence / activity evidence; financials + business bank statements (SoF); explanation of FX timing
scenarios.expectedActivity: Business income coherent with declared trade
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Sub-threshold clustering; timing to FX gaps; USD-cash conversion pressure; self-transfer chains breaking the audit trail
scenarios.outcome: SAR + step-up; decline if unregistered money-changing

scenarios.title: Syrian national resident in Egypt — prohibited-absolute nationality, Egyptian salary only
scenarios.profile: Syrian passport-holder, long-term legal resident in Egypt, salaried locally, no Syria money nexus, no Syria corridor.
scenarios.segment: Salaried (Medium) on a High corridor with prohibited-nationality overlay
scenarios.geography: Residence EG (permitted) · nationality SY (prohibited-absolute) · SoW/SoF = EG salary · no Syria nexus
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12; C2C family within EG
scenarios.corridor: US→EG High; Syria corridor blocked absolutely
scenarios.screening: Syria is prohibited-absolute. Nationality alone does not auto-block, but any Syria SoW/SoF/corridor nexus → Prohibited. Requires very careful G1 confirmation that no nexus exists.
scenarios.rating: Escalated screening; workable ONLY if no Syria money/corridor nexus survives verification — otherwise Prohibited
scenarios.documents: Passport + EG residence + tenure; EG salary evidence; enhanced adverse-media/sanctions screening; explicit confirmation of no Syria SoW/SoF/corridor
scenarios.expectedActivity: EG-salary in; EG-internal flows only
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any emergent Syria nexus (funds, counterparties, corridor) → block + SAR
scenarios.sarPosture: If a Syria nexus is confirmed at any point → Prohibited override, block + SAR
scenarios.outcome: Proceed with escalated screening only on a fully clean, nexus-free profile; otherwise decline. Distinguish from Rule 1 — Syria never qualifies for the documentary path

scenarios.title: Turkish national, resident Istanbul — salaried + part-time gold trading, self-transfer + C2C
scenarios.profile: Salaried with side income from gold/DPMS trading; self-transfers to own accounts; C2C to counterparties.
scenarios.geography: Residence TR · nationality TR · SoW = salary + gold income · SoF = mixed
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12; C2C to gold counterparties
scenarios.corridor: US→TR Medium — dual-use trade, gold value movement, sanctions-evasion adjacency; EDD mandatory
scenarios.screening: Sanctions/PEP clear; screen gold counterparties for sanctions adjacency
scenarios.documents: ID + PoA + salary evidence; for gold income: invoices, DPMS counterparty details, evidence the trade is licensed/legitimate. If gold is primary → treated as a DPMS/prohibited-business concern.
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; incidental gold-related C2C; own-account self-transfers
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Gold-value movement disproportionate to declared side income; invoice manipulation; counterparties adjacent to sanctioned networks; self-transfers preceding gold settlements
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, EDD if gold is incidental and documented; escalate/decline if unlicensed DPMS operation

scenarios.title: German national resident in Turkey — benign third-country national, salary, self-transfer to EU
scenarios.profile: German citizen resident in Turkey, salaried at an EU firm's local office, self-transfers to his own German account, small C2C to EU friends.
scenarios.geography: Residence TR (permitted) · nationality DE · SoW/SoF = salary · no restricted nexus
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12 to own DE account; C2C-02 gift to EU friends
scenarios.corridor: US→TR Medium; no restricted-nationality overlay
scenarios.screening: All clear; standard depth
scenarios.documents: Passport; TR PoA <90d; employer letter or payslips + salary statement. Same-name CoP on the EU self-transfer.
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; periodic same-name self-transfer to DE; small EU C2C
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Self-transfer velocity; unexplained third-party inflows
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, Medium. Teaching point: a benign third-country nationality resident on a Medium corridor scores near-standard

scenarios.title: Bangladeshi national, resident Dhaka — garment-sector salaried, self-transfer + family C2C
scenarios.profile: Garment-sector employee, salaried; family C2C and own-account self-transfers.
scenarios.geography: Residence BD · nationality BD · SoW/SoF = salary
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12; C2C-01 family support
scenarios.corridor: US→BD Medium — remittance velocity, hundi, garment-TBML adjacency
scenarios.screening: Clear
scenarios.documents: ID; PoA <90d; employer letter + payslips + bank statements
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; recurring modest family C2C; occasional self-transfer
scenarios.behaviourWatch: High inbound remittance concentration / funnel to single beneficiary; hundi (missing settlement leg); mule pass-through
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, Medium. Watch funnel-to-single-beneficiary and remittance velocity

scenarios.title: Bangladeshi student, resident Dhaka — account-rental / mule signature (override)
scenarios.profile: Student account shows throughput inconsistent with a student profile; third-party control signals; forwards received C2C onward rapidly.
scenarios.geography: Residence BD · nationality BD · declared SoF = family allowance, incoherent with throughput
scenarios.flow: Inbound C2C from unrelated parties → rapid onward C2C / self-transfer out
scenarios.corridor: US→BD Medium; mule / money-muling
scenarios.screening: Behavioural — may pass list screening
scenarios.documents: Direct RFI with the customer (may be a recruited/coerced victim); profile-vs-activity divergence; third-party-control signals
scenarios.expectedActivity: Student allowance only; no unrelated-payer inflows
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Sudden high throughput; many unrelated senders; rapid in-out; shared device/IP with other new accounts
scenarios.sarPosture: Confirmed mule → freeze + SAR (victim-aware handling). The control is behaviour-based, not 'decline students.'
scenarios.outcome: Freeze + SAR + victim-aware exit

scenarios.title: Indonesian resident — e-commerce seller with crypto exposure, self-transfer to own exchange wallet
scenarios.profile: Self-employed online seller; some virtual-asset conversion; self-transfers between own bank and own exchange wallet; C2C to suppliers/buyers.
scenarios.segment: Self-employed + crypto overlay (Critical if VA disproportionate)
scenarios.geography: Residence ID · nationality ID · SoW/SoF = marketplace income + VA
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer (bank↔own exchange wallet); C2C to P2P counterparties
scenarios.corridor: US→ID Medium — e-wallet/stored-value layering, e-commerce mule, VA conversion
scenarios.screening: Screen wallet exposure (mixer/sanctioned-wallet); travel-rule data
scenarios.rating: Medium; steps to Medium–High / High floor if VA disproportionate or touches mixers/high-risk VASPs
scenarios.documents: ID; PoA; business registration if any; platform/marketplace evidence; clear crypto on/off-ramp explanation; SoF (payout statements + bank statements); wallet ownership + funding source; travel-rule data
scenarios.expectedActivity: Marketplace payouts in; proportionate VA conversion; self-transfer to own KYC'd exchange only
scenarios.behaviourWatch: fiat↔crypto bursts; chain-hopping; self-transfer to a wallet then rapid off-ramp; mixer/sanctioned-wallet adjacency; VA volume off-profile
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, Medium with VA limits. Sanctioned-wallet exposure → block + SAR; mixer exposure → High floor + enhanced monitoring

scenarios.title: Indonesian crypto user — scam/ransomware-linked inbound C2C (victim-pattern)
scenarios.profile: Inbound C2C from scam/ransomware-linked addresses; bursty on/off-ramp; victim-pattern flows; then self-transfers/off-ramps.
scenarios.geography: Residence ID · nationality ID
scenarios.flow: Inbound C2C (tainted) → self-transfer/off-ramp out
scenarios.corridor: US→ID Medium; crypto-layering typology
scenarios.screening: Chain-analysis flags tainted inbound
scenarios.documents: Wallet ownership; funding source; chain-analysis; explanation of inbound payers
scenarios.expectedActivity: Proportionate, clean VA activity
scenarios.behaviourWatch: ≥10% indirect tagged exposure within ≤5 hops; mixer routing; victim-pattern inbound
scenarios.sarPosture: Fraud/ransomware proceeds → freeze + SAR; if the customer is a scam victim, handle supportively while still filing
scenarios.outcome: Freeze + SAR

scenarios.title: Filipino national, resident Manila — salaried, self-transfer + family C2C
scenarios.profile: Salaried; regular family C2C; own-account self-transfers.
scenarios.geography: Residence PH · nationality PH · SoW/SoF = salary
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12; C2C-01 family support
scenarios.corridor: US→PH Medium — OFW-remittance funnel, scam-proceeds inflow, e-wallet mule, POGO/gaming adjacency
scenarios.screening: Clear
scenarios.documents: Passport/national ID; PoA; employer letter/payslip; expected-activity profile (named PH beneficiaries; purpose = family support)
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; recurring family C2C; occasional self-transfer
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Funnel to a single beneficiary; inbound scam-victim funds; many unrelated payers (mule signature); e-wallet mule; gaming-linked counterparties
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, Medium. Step-up on funnel / scam-victim inflow / mule signature

scenarios.title: Filipino remote worker — recruited via fake job, mule via C2C (override)
scenarios.profile: Recently onboarded; a 'remote job' requires receiving C2C from many unrelated payers and forwarding them; employer/geography mismatch; rapid in-out.
scenarios.geography: Residence PH · nationality PH
scenarios.flow: Inbound C2C (many unrelated payers) → rapid onward C2C / self-transfer
scenarios.corridor: US→PH Medium; cyber-scam mule typology
scenarios.screening: Behavioural
scenarios.rating: High → override on confirmed mule pattern
scenarios.documents: Employer verification; RFI on the 'employer' and why unrelated parties fund the account; inbound-payer diversity + rapid-forward analysis
scenarios.expectedActivity: Legitimate salary/earnings only
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Inbound-payer diversity; rapid forward; employer/geo mismatch; shared device/IP
scenarios.sarPosture: Mule recruitment confirmed → freeze + SAR; treat as a potential victim (fair-access) — educate/exit rather than punish
scenarios.outcome: Freeze + SAR + victim-aware exit

scenarios.title: Saudi national, resident Riyadh — affluent, self-transfer + C2C, PEP screen mandatory
scenarios.profile: Affluent salaried/business individual; large-ish own-account self-transfers; C2C to family and associates.
scenarios.segment: Salaried/HNW (Medium) on a Medium corridor with a mandatory PEP/state-linked screen
scenarios.geography: Residence SA · nationality SA · SoW = salary/business · SoF = SA accounts
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12; C2C to family/associates
scenarios.corridor: US→SA Medium — trade settlement, PEP/state-linked, charity/NPO, high-value goods
scenarios.screening: PEP/state-linked screen mandatory (SA dominant typology); sanctions/adverse-media run
scenarios.rating: Medium, escalating to High if PEP-positive or state-linked
scenarios.documents: Passport/national ID; PoA; SoW for large self-transfers/deposits; PEP screening; if PEP-positive → corroborated SoW + senior approval. PEP-neutral wording to the customer.
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary/business in; family C2C; own-account self-transfers proportionate to wealth
scenarios.behaviourWatch: State-linked counterparties; government-contractor payments; unexplained wealth; charity onward flows; high-value-goods settlement
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, Medium; if foreign PEP / close associate confirmed → High floor with corroborated SoW + senior sign-off, or decline on unexplained wealth

scenarios.title: Yemeni national resident in Saudi Arabia — restricted-country nationality, SA salary (Rule 1 posture)
scenarios.profile: Yemeni passport-holder, legal SA resident, salaried locally; family C2C; own-account self-transfers. Wealth is SA-earned; some family SoW traces to Yemen.
scenarios.segment: Salaried (Medium) on a Medium corridor with restricted-nationality overlay
scenarios.geography: Residence SA (permitted) · nationality YE (restricted, non-OFAC-comprehensive) · SoF = SA salary · partial SoW = Yemen family
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12; C2C family support (no Yemen corridor)
scenarios.corridor: US→SA Medium; Yemen corridor blocked; restricted-nationality screening escalation
scenarios.screening: Yemeni nationality → screening escalation + EDD flag; Rule 1 applies to the Yemen-origin SoW portion
scenarios.rating: High floor (restricted-country-SoW under Rule 1) with documented SoW, tenure, nexus screening, senior approval
scenarios.documents: Passport + SA residence + tenure; SA salary evidence (SoF); for the Yemen-origin SoW: documentary origin + how proceeds left Yemen (remittance receipts) + restricted-country nexus screening + senior-approval record
scenarios.expectedActivity: SA salary in; SA-internal + permitted-corridor C2C
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any emergent Yemen corridor (→ reject); restricted-country counterparties; unexplained top-ups from Yemen
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High-floor EDD with senior sign-off; Yemen corridor disabled. Unevidenced Yemen SoW → hold then decline

scenarios.title: Jordanian national, resident Amman — senior government official (foreign PEP), self-transfer + C2C
scenarios.profile: Senior civil servant → foreign PEP; own-account self-transfers; family C2C; some charity donations.
scenarios.segment: Salaried/PEP (High floor) on a Medium-High corridor
scenarios.geography: Residence JO · nationality JO · SoW = official salary + declared assets · SoF = JO accounts
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12; C2C-01 family; C2C-13 charitable help to individuals
scenarios.corridor: US→JO Medium-High — hawala, conflict-adjacency TF/NPO, cash-intensive, charity channels
scenarios.screening: Foreign PEP (positive); sanctions/adverse-media run; charity beneficiary screening
scenarios.rating: High floor (foreign PEP) — corroborated SoW/SoF + senior approval; 12-month review
scenarios.documents: Enhanced ID; corroborated SoW (salary scales, asset declarations, property/investment records); senior-approval record; enhanced-monitoring flag. Charity flows: registration/licence + purpose. PEP-neutral wording.
scenarios.expectedActivity: Official income in; proportionate self-transfers; registered-charity donations
scenarios.behaviourWatch: State-linked counterparties; government-contractor payments; unexplained wealth; unregistered/conflict-adjacent NPO onward flows; cash funding
scenarios.outcome: Onboard as High/PEP with senior sign-off, or decline if SoW unexplained. Unregistered/conflict-adjacent charity → escalate/decline

scenarios.title: Jordanian national, resident Amman — charity-to-individual C2C to conflict-adjacent zones (TF watch)
scenarios.profile: Salaried; makes regular C2C 'charitable help to an individual' with beneficiaries in conflict-adjacent regions; cash-intensive collections.
scenarios.geography: Residence JO · nationality JO
scenarios.flow: C2C-13 charitable help to individuals; possible fan-in collection then onward
scenarios.corridor: US→JO Medium-High; TF/NPO typologies
scenarios.screening: Adverse-media + TF screening on beneficiaries/regions
scenarios.rating: High / enhanced EDD; TF indicators → rapid reporting
scenarios.documents: Beneficiary identity + purpose; if crowd-collection into one individual → unlicensed fundraising / TF risk RFI; corridor restrictions apply
scenarios.expectedActivity: Occasional small-value humanitarian help to named individuals
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Fan-in collection into one individual; onward to conflict-adjacent zones; small-value aggregation-then-forward; cash-intensive funding
scenarios.sarPosture: TF indicators (conflict-region/opaque-beneficiary) → EDD + STR/SAR with rapid reporting
scenarios.outcome: EDD; decline the crowd-collection use; STR on TF indicators

scenarios.title: Filipino OFW, resident UAE — salaried, self-transfer + family C2C to PH
scenarios.profile: Overseas worker, salaried, regular remittance corridor to the Philippines; own-account self-transfers.
scenarios.segment: Migrant worker (High segment) on a UAE→PH corridor
scenarios.geography: Residence AE (permitted) · nationality PH · SoW/SoF = UAE salary
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12; C2C-01 family support to PH
scenarios.corridor: UAE→PH Medium; the register rates UAE as a Critical hub for onward flows — watch chaining
scenarios.screening: Clear
scenarios.documents: Passport + Emirates ID + PoA; employer letter/payslip; named PH beneficiaries + purpose = family support
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; recurring PH family C2C; occasional self-transfer
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Funnel to a single beneficiary; inbound scam-victim funds; many unrelated payers (mule signature); onward chaining beyond PH
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, Medium/monitored. Step-up on funnel or mule signature

scenarios.title: Lebanese national, resident Dubai — restricted-country SoW (Rule 1), self-transfer + C2C
scenarios.profile: Lebanese passport, Dubai resident (6-yr verified tenure), owns a UAE trading business; a material part of source of wealth originates in Lebanon (family business proceeds).
scenarios.segment: Self-employed / business owner (High) with restricted-country SoW overlay
scenarios.geography: Residence AE (permitted, passes G0) · nationality LB (restricted, non-OFAC) · SoW = Lebanon family business + UAE business · SoF = UAE business
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12; C2C-01 family. Any corridor to/from Lebanon stays blocked
scenarios.corridor: UAE domestic Medium + Lebanon-origin SoW → Rule 1 High floor
scenarios.screening: Sanctions/PEP clear; restricted-country nexus screening on the Lebanese entity/counterparties
scenarios.rating: High (restricted-country-SoW floor, Rule 1); 12-month review, reduced limits, enhanced monitoring
scenarios.documents: Emirates ID + residence visa + tenure (Ejari + 6-month address history); Lebanese company trade licence + audited financials/dividend vouchers + evidence how proceeds left Lebanon (remittance receipts); UAE business trade licence; 3–6 months UAE business bank statements (SoF); senior-compliance approval
scenarios.expectedActivity: UAE business income in; proportionate self-transfers; UAE-internal / permitted-corridor C2C
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any emergent Lebanon corridor (→ reject); restricted-country counterparties; SoW top-ups that don't reconcile
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High-floor EDD, senior sign-off recorded; Lebanon corridor disabled. If SoW/SoF can't be evidenced in the RFI window → hold then decline

scenarios.title: UAE resident — self-transfer chaining onward to Pakistan (the hottest route)
scenarios.profile: UAE resident whose own-account self-transfers and C2C chain onward toward Pakistan (UAE→PK is the register's highest-scored corridor, L×I 25).
scenarios.geography: Residence AE · onward corridor to PK
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer / C2C with an onward UAE→PK leg
scenarios.corridor: UAE→PK Critical (25) — hawala density, TF, gold/TBML, bulk-cash/re-export
scenarios.screening: Full screening; TF screening on the PK leg
scenarios.rating: Enhanced-everything: mandatory EDD, tightest limits, reduced velocity, ≤6–12-month review, low anomaly tolerance
scenarios.documents: Beneficiary coherence; hawala/settlement-leg checks; TF screening; SoF; expected-activity for the onward leg
scenarios.expectedActivity: Declared onward-PK purpose with named beneficiaries and settlement leg
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Missing settlement leg; funnel; gold/TBML indicators; bulk-cash; low tolerance for anomaly before SAR/exit
scenarios.sarPosture: Low anomaly tolerance → SAR (goAML/FMU) + exit on confirmation
scenarios.outcome: Enhanced EDD; SAR/exit on anomaly

scenarios.title: UAE resident — sanctions / PF-evasion, self-transfer with onward-to-Iran nexus (block)
scenarios.profile: UAE resident routing value with an onward leg toward Iran; sanctioned-nexus counterparties; dual-use goods references.
scenarios.geography: Residence AE (permitted) BUT onward Iran nexus / sanctioned counterparties
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer / C2C with an onward-to-Iran or sanctioned-wallet nexus
scenarios.corridor: Iran comprehensively sanctioned — any nexus blocks (CRAM §7.1)
scenarios.screening: G1 fails — sanctioned nexus
scenarios.documents: None — no document cures a sanctioned nexus
scenarios.expectedActivity: N/A
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any onward-Iran / sanctioned-wallet nexus on an existing customer → block
scenarios.sarPosture: Block + SAR; OFAC blocking report within 10 business days
scenarios.outcome: Block + SAR + OFAC report

scenarios.title: Born in Russia, German passport, resident in Turkey — birthplace flag only
scenarios.profile: Born in Moscow; naturalised German; resident in Turkey; salaried; no Russian assets, accounts, or corridor. Self-transfers to own DE/TR accounts; small C2C.
scenarios.geography: Residence TR (permitted) · nationality DE · birthplace RU (screening flag only) · no Russia money nexus
scenarios.flow: Self-transfer C2C-12; C2C-02 gift
scenarios.corridor: US→TR Medium
scenarios.screening: Rule 3 birth-country carve-out — birthplace alone does not prohibit; routes to enhanced screening handled behind the scenes. No Russian nationality held; no money nexus.
scenarios.documents: Baseline (passport, TR PoA, salary evidence) + enhanced adverse-media/screening pass; no extra customer docs unless screening surfaces something
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salary in; own-account self-transfers; small C2C
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any emergent Russia nexus (funds, counterparties, corridor) → re-score / escalate
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, screening disposition logged. Teaching point: birthplace ≠ nationality ≠ residence
